sentences.text: He thinks love is nice, but he believes friendship is much more important.
In fact, he believes nothing in the world is better or more special than a true friendship.
A Green Linnet, sitting in a nearby willow tree, asked what he thinks a devoted friend should do.
The Duck also wanted to know, so she swam to the end of the pond to show her children a good example.
